name: freshrss
title: FreshRSS
description: Browse and manage your FreshRSS articles
author: semyon_surkov

commands.name: index
commands.title: Browse Articles
commands.description: Browse, search and manage your FreshRSS reading list

commands.name: feeds
commands.title: Feed List
commands.description: Browse your subscriptions and read articles by feed

preferences.name: baseUrl
preferences.title: FreshRSS Base URL
preferences.description: The base URL of your FreshRSS instance (e.g., https://rss.example.com)

preferences.name: apiPassword
preferences.title: API Password
preferences.description: Your FreshRSS API password (configured in FreshRSS account settings)

preferences.name: debugLogging
preferences.title: Debug Logging
preferences.description: Enable verbose FreshRSS request logs in Raycast developer logs for troubleshooting.
preferences.label: Enable Debug Logging

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and retry publishing again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use "npm run publish" instead.

" && exit 1
